title: ourisia coccinea
intro: Ourisia coccinea, also known as red fox or red foxglove, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, containing compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ourisia coccinea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Ourisia coccinea can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for herbal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
